headline: U.A.E. Suspends Operations at Gas Field After Drone Strike
summary: United Arab Emirates authorities said early Tuesday they had contained and controlled a fire at the Shah gas field caused by a drone strike. Operations at the facility have been suspended while damage is assessed, and no injuries have been reported, Abu Dhabi’s media office said.

raw.headline: U.A.E. Suspends Operations at Gas Field After Drone Strike
raw.summary: United Arab Emirates authorities said early Tuesday they had contained and controlled a fire at the Shah gas field caused by a drone strike. Operations at the facility have been suspended while damage is assessed, and no injuries have been reported, Abu Dhabi’s media office said.

headline: Why traders are getting nervous about Iran's $200 oil warning as the conflict drags on
summary: Analysts told CNBC that the prospect of oil prices soaring to $200 per barrel shouldn’t be ruled out as the Iran war drags on.

raw.headline: Why traders are getting nervous about Iran's $200 oil warning as the conflict drags on
raw.summary: Analysts told CNBC that the prospect of oil prices soaring to $200 per barrel shouldn’t be ruled out as the Iran war drags on.

headline: Treasury yields drop as investors track lower oil prices and look ahead to Fed rate decision
summary: U.S. Treasury yields moved lower to start the week as investors watched seesaw movements in the price of crude oil and anticipated this week's Fed meeting.

raw.headline: Treasury yields drop as investors track lower oil prices and look ahead to Fed rate decision
raw.summary: U.S. Treasury yields moved lower to start the week as investors watched seesaw movements in the price of crude oil and anticipated this week's Fed meeting.

headline: Oil’s war-driven volatility pulls in record retail money, fueling 'meme-style' trading
summary: Net retail buying of oil ETFs hit a record $211 million on March 12, surpassing the previous peak seen during the market turmoil in May 2020, according to Vanda Research.

raw.headline: Oil’s war-driven volatility pulls in record retail money, fueling 'meme-style' trading
raw.summary: Net retail buying of oil ETFs hit a record $211 million on March 12, surpassing the previous peak seen during the market turmoil in May 2020, according to Vanda Research.

headline: CNBC Daily Open: Strait talk from Trump
summary: President Donald Trump voices frustration at the lack of help from allies in supporting tankers through the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: Big Tech purchases of carbon credits explode amid AI race, with Microsoft leading the way
summary: Carbon credit purchases by Amazon, Google, Meta and Microsoft skyrocketed in 2023, based on tracked purchases.
